title: Kgwebo ya Makgoba ya go Kgabaganya Atlantic
subject: History

sources.title: Grade 7 - Term 2: The Transatlantic slave trade
Olaudah Equiano, enslaved person and writer, dies
African captives aboard the Amistad revolt
Nat Turner leads a slave insurrection in Southampton, Virginia, USA
William Wilberforce, English philanthropist and champion of the abolishment of the slave trade, is born
British Parliament passes the Abolition of the Slave Trade Act
Slavery abolished throughout the British Empire

slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Mophato wa 7 - Kgato ya Bogolo
slides.title: Kgwebo ya Makgoba ya go Kgabaganya Atlantic
slides.lead: Ka moo dimilione tsa batho ba Aforika ba neng ba tshwarwa, ba rwalwa ka dikepe go kgabaganya Lewatle la Atlantic, mme ba patelediwa go nna makgoba - le ka moo kgwebo eo e neng ya feleletsa e emisitswe ka teng.

media.alt: Mmapa o o bontshang metsu e meraro e kgabaganya Lewatle la Atlantic magareng ga Yuropa, Aforika le dinaga tsa Amerika, e bopa khutlotharo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#eaf1f4'/><path d='M40 30 h34 v18 h-34 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 60 q26 -10 40 20 q6 40 -18 60 q-30 8 -34 -30 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M30 96 q22 -6 30 24 q-2 34 -26 30 q-18 -30 -4 -54 Z' fill='#a9865a'/><path d='M76 40 q60 8 78 34' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#a)'/><path d='M172 96 q-70 20 -128 12' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M40 96 q10 -30 40 -52' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='160' cy='150' r='0'/></svg>

slides.notes: Simolola ka tlhokomelo. Tlhalosa gore thuto e e tsamaisana le histori e e botlhoko e mo go yona batho ba mmatota ba boneng matshwenyego a magolo, mme re e ithuta ka tlotlo. Baakanya dikarolo tse nne tsa kgang e re tla e latelang: go tshwarwa kwa Aforika, loeto lwa lewatle lo lo bidiwang Middle Passage, bokgoba kwa dinageng tsa Amerika, le ntwa e telele ya go fedisa (emisa) kgwebo. Ela tlhoko gore Aforika Borwa e na le histori ya yona ya bokgoba e e amanang le yona kwa Kapa.

slides.title: Kgwebo ya makgoba ya go kgabaganya Atlantic e ne e le eng?
slides.lead: Mo dingwageng di ka nna 350, barekisi ba Yuropa ba ne ba reka le go romela ka dikepe batho ba Aforika ba ba dirilweng makgoba go kgabaganya Lewatle la Atlantic.

blocks.text: Go tloga ka bo-1500 go fitlha ka bo-1800, dinaga tsa Yuropa tse di jaaka Portugal, Boritane, Fora, Spain le Netherlands di ne di tshwara kgotsa di reka batho ba Aforika mme di ba romela kwa dikoloneng tsa dinaga tsa Amerika. Kwa ba ne ba patelediwa go dira ba sa duelwe e bile ba se na kgololosego.

items: 'Transatlantic' e kaya 'go kgabaganya Lewatle la Atlantic'.
Boradihistori ba akanya gore batho ba Aforika ba ka nna dimilione di le 12 ba ne ba rwalwa ka dikepe go kgabaganya Atlantic.
Batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ne ba tshwarwa jaaka thoto e e ka rekwang le go rekiswa.

slides.notes: Netefatsa gore baithuti ba tlhaloganya lefoko 'go dirwa lekgoba' - motho yo o dirilweng lekgoba ke ba bangwe, e seng lekgoba ka tlholego. Dirisa 'motho yo o dirilweng lekgoba' go na le 'lekgoba' gore botho jwa motho bo nne bo bonala. [SME] Palo ya batho ba ka nna dimilione di le 12 ba ba tshwerweng ba rwalwa ke tekanyetso e e dirisiwang thata go tswa mo Trans-Atlantic Slave Trade Database; netefatsa mafoko a a tlhomameng a o batlang gore baithuti ba a tshware ka tlhogo.

slides.eyebrow: Ka moo kgwebo e neng e dira ka teng
slides.title: Kgwebo ya khutlotharo
slides.lead: Dikepe di ne di tsamaya tsela e e nang le matlhakore a mararo magareng ga Yuropa, Aforika le dinaga tsa Amerika, di dira poelo mo boemong bongwe le bongwe.

items: Yuropa go ya Aforika: dikepe di ne di rwala ditlhobolo, letsela, bojalwa le dilwana tsa tshipi go gweba ka tsona ka batho.
Aforika go ya dinageng tsa Amerika: batho ba Aforika ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ne ba pitlaganngwa mo dikepeng mo loetong lwa Middle Passage.
Dinaga tsa Amerika go ya Yuropa: dikepe di ne di boa di tletse sukiri, kotone, motsoko le kofi.

columns.text: Lebaka la go gola ga yona

Dikolone tsa Yuropa kwa dinageng tsa Amerika di ne di tlhoka palo e kgolo ya badiri mo masimong a tsona a magolo (plantations). Tiro ya batho ba Aforika ba ba dirilweng makgoba e ne ya humisa beng le barekisi thata, ka jalo kgwebo ya nna ya gola le go gola.

media.alt: Setshwantsho sa khutlotharo se se nang le Yuropa kwa godimo, Aforika kwa tlase ka fa lehatlheng le le jang, le dinaga tsa Amerika kwa tlase ka fa molemeng, metsu e dikologa se.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 170' role='img'><rect width='220' height='170' fill='#f4efe6'/><polygon points='110,24 40,140 180,140' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='110' cy='24' r='7' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='40' cy='140' r='7' fill='#a9865a'/><circle cx='180' cy='140' r='7' fill='#7a8b5a'/><text x='110' y='14' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' fill='#333'>Europe</text><text x='30' y='158' font-size='11' fill='#333'>Americas</text><text x='158' y='158' font-size='11' fill='#333'>Africa</text></svg>

slides.notes: Dirisa setshwantsho sa khutlotharo go dira gore tsela e utlwale sentle. Gatelela gore batho e ne e le morwalo (thoto) mo karolong ya bobedi - Middle Passage - e diteng tse di latelang di e sekasekang. Botsa baithuti gore ke ka ntlha yang barekisi ba neng ba akanya gore thulaganyo e e na le poelo, mme o ba tlhotlheletse: poelo ke ya mang, mme e duelwa ka tefiso efe ya botho?

slides.title: Go tshwarwa kwa Aforika
slides.lead: Batho ba ne ba tshwarwa mo ditlhaselong le mo dintweng, mme ba tsamaisiwa go ya lotshitshing ba bo ba rekisiwa.

blocks.text: Bontsi jwa batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ne ba tswa kwa Aforika Bophirima le Bogareng. Bangwe ba ne ba tshwarwa mo ditlhaselong kgotsa mo dintweng, ba bangwe ba ne ba thopiwa. Ba ne ba patelediwa go tsamaya sekgala se se leele go ya lotshitshing, gantsi ba golegilwe ka diketane, mme ba tshwarelwa mo dikgolegelong tse di bidiwang 'diforoto tsa makgoba' kgotsa 'mekoti' mo mafelong a a jaaka Elmina le Setlhaketlhake sa Goree.

items: Malapa a ne a kgaoganngwa mme ka bontsi ga a ka a tlhola a bonana gape.
Batho ba ba tshwerweng ba ne ba rekisediwa barekisi ba Yuropa go ananngwa ka dithoto.
Ba ne ba tshwaiwa ka letshwao le le fisitsweng mme ba tshwarelwa mo diforotong tse di tletseng pele ba tsenngwa mo dikepeng.

media.alt: Foroto ya matlapa e e mo lotshitshing fa thoko ga lewatle, e na le sekepe se sennye kgakajana le lotshitshi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#eaf1f4'/><rect y='108' width='240' height='52' fill='#7fa9b8'/><rect x='24' y='150' width='120' height='10' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='30' y='64' width='96' height='48' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='30' y='54' width='16' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='58' y='54' width='16' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='86' y='54' width='16' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='110' y='54' width='16' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='66' y='84' width='16' height='28' fill='#5c4a30'/><path d='M180 96 l10 -30 l10 30 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='189' y='60' width='2' height='36' fill='#5c4a30'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tshwara slaete e ka kelotlhoko le kutlwelobotlhoko. Gatelela gore batho ba ba tshwerweng e ne e le batho fela ba tlwaelo - balemi, batsadi, bana - e seng disenyi. Umaka gore babusi bangwe ba Aforika le barekisi le bona ba ne ba nna le seabe mo go rekiseng batho ba ba tshwerweng, mme tlhokego le bogolo jo bogolo jwa kgwebo bo ne bo tswa kwa dikoloneng tsa Yuropa. Tila dintlha tse di boitshegang; nna le tsepamo mo tatlhegelong ya kgololosego le lelapa.

slides.title: Loeto lwa Bogare (Middle Passage)
slides.lead: Loeto lo lo boitshegang lwa lewatle go kgabaganya Atlantic lo lo neng lo ka tsaya dibeke tse dintsi.

blocks.text: 'Middle Passage' e ne e le loeto lwa go kgabaganya Lewatle la Atlantic, karolo ya bogare ya kgwebo ya khutlotharo. Makgolokgolo a batho a ne a pitlaganngwa thata ka fa tlase ga sekepe ba na le mowa, dijo kgotsa metsi a mannye. Malwetse a ne a anama ka bonako mme ba le bantsi ba ne ba sa phologe loeto.

items: Batho ba ba tshwerweng ba ne ba golegilwe mmogo ka diketane ba se na sebaka sa go tshikinyega.
Go kgabaganya go ne go ka tsaya go simolola ka dibeke di ka nna tlhano go fitlha dikgwedi tse tharo.
Boradihistori ba akanya gore mongwe mo go ba supa ba ba tshwerweng o ne a swa mo loetong.

media.alt: Sekepe se se tsamayang se le mo makhubung a a bogale se kgabaganya lewatle.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#dce8ec'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#4f7f92'/><path d='M60 104 h120 l-16 26 h-88 Z' fill='#5c4a30'/><rect x='116' y='40' width='4' height='66' fill='#3d3222'/><path d='M120 46 l44 20 l-44 12 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M116 46 l-40 20 l40 12 Z' fill='#e7ddc9'/><path d='M0 132 q30 -12 60 0 q30 12 60 0 q30 -12 60 0 q30 12 60 0' fill='none' stroke='#eaf1f4' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: E ke pelo ya maikutlo ya thuto - e boloke e le ya nnete e bile e na le tlotlo, e seng ya go tsosa maikutlo fela. Tlhalosa gore ba ba neng ba phologa Middle Passage ba ne ba goroga ba koafetse, ba tshogile e bile ba le kgakala le gae, ba bua dipuo tse dintsi tse di farologaneng. [SME] Palo ya 'mongwe mo go ba supa o swele' (e ka nna 15 porosente, e batla e le loso lwa dimilione di le 1.8 ka kakaretso) ke tekanyetso e e dirisiwang thata; netefatsa palo e e tlhomameng le boleele jwa loeto jo o batlang go bo kwala pele o phasalatsa.

slides.eyebrow: Karolo 3 - Bokgoba kwa dinageng tsa Amerika
slides.title: Ba rekisiwa mo papadisong ya thekiso (auction)
slides.lead: Fa dikepe di goroga, ba ba neng ba phologile ba ne ba rekisiwa jaaka dithoto go yo o ntshang theko e kgolo go gaisa.

blocks.text: Mo maemakepeng a a kwa Brazil, ditlhaketlhake tsa Caribbean le Amerika Bokone, batho ba Aforika ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ne ba tlhatlhobiwa mme ba rekisiwa mo dipapadisong tsa thekiso tsa phatlalatsa. Bareki ba ne ba duela madi ka batho, mme malapa a a neng a phologile loeto mmogo gantsi a ne a kgaoganngwa gape mo lefelong la thekiso.

items: Batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ne ba newa maina a masha e bile ba se na ditshwanelo tsa semolao.
Ba ne ba ka rekwa, ba rekisiwa, ba otlhaiwa kgotsa ba fiwa ke beng ba bona.
Bontsi ba ne ba romelwa kwa masimong a magolo a a neng a lema sukiri, kotone le motsoko.

media.alt: Serala se se godimo sa thekiso se motho a emeng mo go sona, le boidiidi jo bonnye jwa batho ka fa tlase.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='70' y='96' width='80' height='16' fill='#8a6a3a'/><rect x='78' y='112' width='10' height='24' fill='#5c4a30'/><rect x='132' y='112' width='10' height='24' fill='#5c4a30'/><circle cx='110' cy='72' r='11' fill='#a9865a'/><rect x='103' y='84' width='14' height='14' fill='#a9865a'/><g fill='#7a8b5a'><circle cx='40' cy='120' r='8'/><circle cx='60' cy='124' r='8'/><circle cx='166' cy='122' r='8'/><circle cx='186' cy='120' r='8'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Gatelela ka fa bokgoba bo neng bo amoga batho botho ka teng: batho ba tshwarwa jaaka thoto e e beelwang theko le go rekisiwa. Golaganya le megopolo ya tekatekano le ditshwanelo tsa botho tse baithuti ba setseng ba di itse. Supa gore dijalo tse di tshwanang - sukiri, kotone, motsoko - di ne di boela kwa Yuropa mo karolong ya boraro ya khutlotharo, di golaganya thulaganyo yotlhe mmogo.

slides.eyebrow: Karolo 3 - Bokgoba kwa dinageng tsa Amerika
slides.title: Botshelo mo masimong a magolo
slides.lead: Batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ne ba dira diura tse ditelele, tse di boima ka fa tlase ga taolo e e bogale.

blocks.text: Mo masimong a magolo, batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ne ba dira go tswa letsatsi le tlhaba go fitlha le phirima ba sa duelwe. Balebeledi ba ne ba dirisa kotlhao e e setlhogo go patelela batho go utlwa. Le fa go ne go na le setlhogo se, ditshaba tse di dirilweng makgoba di ne di boloka botho jwa tsona bo tshela ka mmino, go anela dikgang, bodumedi le ka go ngaparela dikgakologelo tsa gae.

items: Tiro e ne e akaretsa go jala le go kgaola lotlhaka lwa sukiri, le go kga kotone.
Batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ne ba na le dijo tse dinnye, matlo a a bokoa e bile ba se na kgololosego ya go tsamaya.
Dipuo tsa Aforika, dijo le ngwao di ne tsa phologa mme tsa bopa ditso tse disha.

media.alt: Methalo ya dimela tse ditelele mo tshimong e na le kago e nnye kgakala ka fa tlase ga letsatsi le le mogote.

slides.notes: Lekalekanya matshwenyego le seriti sa botho le go itwela-ka-ngwao: batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba e ne e se batswasetlhabelo ba ba iketlileng. Tlhalosa ka moo ditso tse di tswakaneng di neng tsa gola ka teng kwa dinageng tsa Amerika (mmino, dijo, tumelo) tse di sa ntseng di bopa lefatshe le gompieno. Se se baakanyetsa slaete e e latelang ya go itwela ka tlhamalalo le kgaratlho.

slides.title: Go ganetsa bokgoba
slides.lead: Batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ne ba ganetsa ka ditsela tse dintsi tsa bopelokgale, tse dikgolo le tse dinnye.

blocks.heading: Go itwela ka metlha
blocks.text: Go dira ka bonya, go roba didirisiwa, go tshaba le go boloka ngwao ya Aforika e tshela.

blocks.heading: Ditsuologo
blocks.text: Ditsuologo tse di jaaka tsuologo ya sekepe sa Amistad (1839) le boruri jwa ga Nat Turner kwa Virginia (1831).

blocks.heading: Ditshaba tse di gololesegileng
blocks.text: Batho ba ba neng ba tshabile ba ne ba thea ditshaba tse di fitlhilweng tse di bidiwang 'maroon' mme ba lwela go nna ba gololesegile.

slides.notes: Gatelela boikemelo: batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ne ba ganetsa ka metlha. Batho ba ba tshwerweng ba Amistad ba ne ba tsaya sekepe sa bona mme kwa bofelong ba fenya kgololosego ya bona mo tshekong e e itsegeng; Nat Turner o ne a etelela pele tsuologo e e nang le dibetsa e e neng ya reketlisa borwa jwa Amerika. Boobabedi ba tlhagelela mo polokelong ya SAHO ya ditiragalo tse di nang le matlha. Boloka dintlha di tshwanela dingwaga tsa baithuti mme o nne le tsepamo mo bopelokgaleng le mo keletsong ya kgololosego.

slides.eyebrow: Lentswe le le tswang mo historing - 1789
slides.title: Olaudah Equiano o anela kgang ya gagwe
slides.lead: Monna yo o kileng a nna lekgoba o ne a kwala buka e e itsegeng e e tlhalosang se a neng a se tshela.

blocks.text: Dikgole tsa basadi, le go fegelwa ga ba ba swang, di ne tsa dira gore botlhe e nne pono ya letshogo e e batlang e sa akanyege.

Olaudah Equiano o ne a tshwarwa kwa Aforika a sa le ngwana mme a phologa Middle Passage. Morago ga go ithekela kgololosego ya gagwe, o ne a kwala buka ka botshelo jwa gagwe. Kgang ya gagwe e ne ya thusa batho ba bantsi kwa Boritane go tlhaloganya setlhogo sa kgwebo ya makgoba le go ema nokeng go e fedisa.

items: Buka ya gagwe e ne e le nngwe ya dipego tsa ntlha tse di kwadilweng ke Moaforika yo o kileng a nna lekgoba.
O ne a etela mafelo a a farologaneng mme a bua kgatlhanong le kgwebo ya makgoba.
Mantswe a a jaaka a gagwe a ne a thusa go godisa mokgatlho wa go fedisa bokgoba.

slides.notes: Tlhalosa maatla a paki e e buang ka boyona: dipalopalo di ka utlwala di le kgakala, mme mafoko a ga Equiano a dira gore boammaaruri jwa botho bo utlwale sentle. [SME] Nopolo e tswa mo bukeng ya ga Equiano ya 1789 ya Interesting Narrative mme e gatisitswe gantsi; ka kopo netefatsa mafoko a a tlhomameng le tshupanaka ya tsebe kgatlhanong le kgatiso ya borutegi pele o phatlalatsa, ka gonne go na le dipharologano di le mmalwa tse di farologaneng gannye.

slides.title: Go fedisa kgwebo ya makgoba
slides.lead: Morago ga dingwaga tsa matsholo, melao e ne ya dirwa go fedisa (emisa) kgwebo mme morago le bokgoba ka bojona.

blocks.text: 'Abolition' e kaya go fedisa sengwe. Batshwaramatsholo ba ba bidiwang di-abolitionist, mmogo le batho ba ba kileng ba nna makgoba, ba ne ba ngangisana gore bokgoba bo phoso mme bo tshwanetse go emisiwa. Kwa Boritane, **William Wilberforce** o ne a etelela pele ntwa kwa Palamenteng.

items: 1807: Boritane bo ne ba dira molao wa go fedisa kgwebo ya makgoba (go reka le go romela batho ka dikepe).
1833-1834: bokgoba ka bojona bo ne jwa fediswa mo Mmusomogolong wa Boritane, go akaretsa le Kapa.
Bokgoba bo ne jwa fela moragonyana mo dinageng tse dingwe - USA ka 1865 le Brazil ka 1888.

media.alt: Diketane tse pedi tse di bulegileng, tse di robegileng di na le letsatsi le le tlhabang ka fa morago ga tsona.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='110' cy='96' r='30' fill='#e8a13a' opacity='0.4'/><g fill='none' stroke='#5c4a30' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='70' cy='84' r='14'/><circle cx='86' cy='100' r='14'/><circle cx='134' cy='84' r='14'/><circle cx='150' cy='100' r='14'/></g><line x1='100' y1='92' x2='120' y2='92' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='10'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlhalosa pharologano magareng ga go fedisa kgwebo (1807) le go fedisa bokgoba ka bojona (1833-1834) - ntlha e e tlwaelegileng ya go tlhakatlhakana. Ela tlhoko gore go fediswa ga bokgoba ga go a ka ga tlisa tekatekano ka bonako; batho ba ba kileng ba nna makgoba ba ne ba santse ba lebana le mathata a magolo. Golaganya ka tlhamalalo le Aforika Borwa: bokgoba kwa Kapa bo ne jwa fela e le karolo ya go fediswa ga bokgoba ga Mmusomogolo wa Boritane ka 1834.

slides.title: Matlha a botlhokwa a kgwebo ya makgoba ya go kgabaganya Atlantic

events.label: Kgwebo ya makgoba ya go kgabaganya Atlantic e simolola go gola
Olaudah Equiano o phatlalatsa kgang ya botshelo jwa gagwe
Boritane bo fedisa kgwebo ya makgoba
Nat Turner o etelela pele tsuologo kwa Virginia
Bokgoba bo fediswa mo Mmusomogolong wa Boritane le kwa Kapa
Brazil e fedisa bokgoba - naga ya bofelo mo dinageng tsa Amerika

slides.notes: Dirisa tatelano ya dinako go kopanya thuto yotlhe pele ga slaete ya boswa. Kopa baithuti go lemoga gore kgwebo e ne ya tsaya makgolo a dingwaga mme go e fedisa le gona go ne ga tsaya masomeng a dingwaga a matsholo. Supa letlha la Kapa (1834) gore kgang e golagane le histori ya naga ya bona.

slides.eyebrow: Ke ka ntlha yang go sa ntse go le botlhokwa
slides.title: Boswa jwa kgwebo ya makgoba
slides.lead: Ditlamorago tsa kgwebo ya makgoba di sa ntse di utlwiwa mo lefatsheng lotlhe gompieno.

blocks.text: Kgwebo ya makgoba e ne ya gasagasa dimilione tsa batho ba Aforika go ralala dinaga tsa Amerika le kwa ntle ga tsona, ya bopa se re se bitsang African diaspora (phatlalalo ya Maaforika). E ne ya tlisa matshwenyego a a boitshegang, mme batho ba Aforika le bona ba ne ba bopa puo, mmino, dijo le ngwao ya dinaga tse dintsi. Histori ya yona ya semorafe le tlhaelo ya tekatekano e sa ntse e sekasekwa gompieno.

items: Kwa Kapa, batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba ba tswang Aforika le Asia ba ne ba thusa go bopa setshaba sa Aforika Borwa le setshaba sa Cape Malay.
Mmino le ngwao ya Aforika di ne tsa tlhotlheletsa jazz, blues le mmino o mongwe wa lefatshe.
Go ithuta histori e go re thusa go ema kgatlhanong le bokgoba le semorafe gompieno.

slides.notes: Tlisa kgang gae kwa Aforika Borwa: Kapa e ne e na le kgwebo ya yona ya makgoba, mme Slave Lodge kwa Motsemogolong wa Kapa e gopola histori e. Gatelela go nna pelokgale le seabe sa ngwao sa batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba le ditlogolwana tsa bona, gore baithuti ba tsamaye ba na le pego ya boammaaruri le maikutlo a seriti sa botho le tsholofelo.

slides.eyebrow: Boeletsa mme o tlhatlhobe tlhaloganyo ya gago
slides.title: Se re se ithutileng
slides.lead: Kgwebo ya makgoba ya go kgabaganya Atlantic e ne ya patelela dimilione tsa Maaforika go nna makgoba, mme batho ba ne ba ganetsa mme kwa bofelong e ne ya fediswa.

blocks.text: Re latetse kgang go tloga mo **go tshwarweng** kwa Aforika, go kgabaganya **Middle Passage**, go tsena mo **bokgobeng** kwa dinageng tsa Amerika, le go ralala kgaratlho e telele ya **go fediswa (abolition)**. Jaanong bontsha se o se ithutileng.

blocks.question: Tlhalosa gore 'kgwebo ya khutlotharo' e ne e le eng mme o tlhalose dikarolo tse tharo tsa loeto.
Ke ka ntlha yang Middle Passage e ne e le maitemogelo a a boitshegang jaana mo bathong ba Aforika ba ba dirilweng makgoba?
Tlhalosa ditsela tse pedi tse batho ba ba dirilweng makgoba ba neng ba ganetsa bokgoba ka tsona, mme o tlhalose gore 'abolition' e kaya eng.

slides.notes: Dirisa dipotso tse tharo jaaka tiro e e kwadilweng kgotsa puisano ya phaposi; kabo ya maduo e latela mekgwa ya CAPS ya dipotso tse di theilweng mo metswiding le go kwala serapa. Boela mo mafokong a botlhokwa: go dirwa lekgoba, transatlantic, Middle Passage, tshimo e kgolo (plantation), go ganetsa, go fediswa (abolition). Konela ka go gakolola baithuti gore go ithuta histori e go re thusa go tlotla kgololosego le ditshwanelo tsa botho gompieno.
